CommunityApplications.Profile:
Templates for self-hosted media tools published under [Will-Luck](https://github.com/Will-Luck).
**iplayer-arr** -- BBC iPlayer download manager for Sonarr. Acts as both a Newznab indexer and a SABnzbd-compatible download client, so Sonarr can discover and grab BBC iPlayer content with no Perl/get_iplayer dependency. Includes an optional built-in WireGuard VPN client for use outside the UK.
Support: post in the Unraid forum thread linked below, or file an issue on the app's GitHub repository.
